body_preview: - Current assessment matched this harness seed: The assessment found `deepseek cache-report` returning no metrics even though the DeepSeek protocol layer and gnome keys exist. Cache observability is required to optimize stable-prefix prompt layout and cost/latency. Edit Surface: - src/prompt.rs, src/deepseek.rs, src/state.rs Verifier: - cargo test deepseek p
expected_evidence: State summary includes DeepSeek cache hit/miss token gnomes after a run with usage data. Dashboard cache ratio remains sourced from numeric usage/state events, not prose. Implementation Notes: This task was seeded by the harness before planner exploration because recent runs reached planning without durable task files. Treat it as a minimum viable task for D
title: Record DeepSeek prompt cache metrics during prompt runs
